title: [Nyessem, Testing Module Exit]
description: Twin cascading stone fountains run the room's length, simulating gentle waterfalls along two sides of this area.  Soft, silver and violet-threaded cushions are spread across the floor between these fountains, piled into a variety of improvised arrangements.  In the room's center is a marble table set with refreshments.  Suspended prominently over a broad topaz-studded tunnel is a wood and stone sign.
